script.name: !move.mapsector.multi
script.description: Map a sector with multiple ships
script.sourceplaintext:
$x = $a.position[0] $y = $a.position[1] $z = $a.position[2]
gosub sub.ComputeRange skip if $ret.Range return null
$drones.used = table alloc $Way.Y = 0 gosub sub.ComputeWaypoints
$drone.count = size of array $aDrones $aDronesToWaypoints = array alloc: size=$drone.count $j = 0 while $j < $drone.count $arr = array alloc: size=0 $aDronesToWaypoints[$j] = $arr inc $j = end
if $drone.count < 4 $waypointsPerDrone = 2 else $waypointsPerDrone = 1 end $waypointsLeft = 1
$i = 0 $j = 0 $max = size of array $aWaypoints while $i < $max $waypoint = $aWaypoints[$i] inc $i =
$arr = $aDronesToWaypoints[$j] $arr = merge arrays, $arr, $waypoint, null, null, null $aDronesToWaypoints[$j] = $arr dec $waypointsLeft = if $waypointsLeft < 1 $waypointsLeft = $waypointsPerDrone inc $j = end do if $j >= $drone.count $j = 0 end
$unmanaged = table alloc @ = [THIS] -> call script !lib.cmd.unmanage : Table of Ships=$unmanaged
$j = 0 while $j < $drone.count $drone = $aDrones[$j] $waypoint = $aDronesToWaypoints[$j] $drones.used[$drone] = $waypoint gosub sub.ManageDrone @ START $drone -> call script !move.explore.waypoints : Sector=[SECTOR] Waypoints=$waypoint inc $j = end
$remaining.waypoints = array alloc: size=0
while size of table $drones.used if size of array $remaining.waypoints $i = size of array $aDrones while $i dec $i = $drone = $aDrones[$i] $waypoint = $remaining.waypoints[0] $drones.used[$drone] = $waypoint gosub sub.ManageDrone @ START $drone -> call script !move.explore.waypoints : Sector=[SECTOR] Waypoints=$waypoint remove element from array $remaining.waypoints at index 0 skip if size of array $remaining.waypoints break end end
@ = [THIS] -> move around 20000 ms @ = wait 100 ms
$drone = get next key: table=$drones.used key=null $remove.drones = array alloc: size=0 while $drone $waypoint = $drones.used[$drone] if not $drone -> exists $waypoint = $drones.used[$drone] append $waypoint to array $remaining.waypoints append $drone to array $remove.drones else $carrier = $drone ->get carrier if $carrier == [THIS] @ skip if [THIS] -> call script !lib.carrier.isshipbusy : Ship=$drone Allow Recall=[TRUE] append $drone to array $remove.drones end
if not $drone -> is script !move.explore.waypoints on stack of task=0 append $drone to array $remove.drones end end $drone = get next key: table=$drones.used key=$drone end
do if size of array $remove.drones remove key $remove.drones from table $drones.used end
$drones.used = clone array: $aDrones while size of array $drones.used
$drone.count = size of array $drones.used while $drone.count dec $drone.count = $drone = $drones.used[$drone.count] if not $drone -> exists remove element from array $drones.used at index $drone.count continue end if $drone -> is docked remove element from array $drones.used at index $drone.count continue end if $drone -> is of class Special Drone remove element from array $drones.used at index $drone.count continue end
$homebase = $drone -> get homebase if not $homebase -> exists remove element from array $drones.used at index $drone.count continue end
if not $drone -> is script !move.returntohomebase on stack of task=0 @ START $drone -> call script !move.returntohomebase : $drone ->set command: COMMAND_RETURN_HOME end end
@ = wait randomly from 8000 to 15000 ms end
return null
* ===================================================
sub.ComputeRange: $ret.Range = 0 if $aDrones $i = size of array $aDrones while $i dec $i = $drone = $aDrones[$i] $range = $drone -> get scanner range $ret.Range = get maximum, $ret.Range, $range, null, null, null end do if $ret.Range $ret.Range = ( $ret.Range * 3 ) / 4 end endsub
* compute way points sub.ComputeWaypoints: $aWaypoints = array alloc: size=0
$sector.size = [SECTOR] ->get sector gate distance $sector.size = fixed multiply and divide: $sector.size * 5000 / 4
$fromCentre = 0 while $fromCentre < $sector.size $Way.X = $x + ( $ret.Range + $fromCentre ) $Way.Z = $z + ( $ret.Range + $fromCentre ) $start.way = create new array, arguments=$Way.X, $Way.Y, $Way.Z, null, null $Way.X = $x - ( $ret.Range + $fromCentre ) $end.way = create new array, arguments=$Way.X, $Way.Y, $Way.Z, null, null $waypoint = create new array, arguments=$start.way, $end.way, null, null, null append $waypoint to array $aWaypoints
$start.way = create new array, arguments=$Way.X, $Way.Y, $Way.Z, null, null $Way.Z = $z - ( $ret.Range + $fromCentre ) $end.way = create new array, arguments=$Way.X, $Way.Y, $Way.Z, null, null $waypoint = create new array, arguments=$start.way, $end.way, null, null, null append $waypoint to array $aWaypoints
$start.way = create new array, arguments=$Way.X, $Way.Y, $Way.Z, null, null $Way.X = $x + ( $ret.Range + $fromCentre ) $end.way = create new array, arguments=$Way.X, $Way.Y, $Way.Z, null, null $waypoint = create new array, arguments=$start.way, $end.way, null, null, null append $waypoint to array $aWaypoints
$start.way = create new array, arguments=$Way.X, $Way.Y, $Way.Z, null, null $Way.Z = $z + ( $ret.Range + $fromCentre ) $end.way = create new array, arguments=$Way.X, $Way.Y, $Way.Z, null, null $waypoint = create new array, arguments=$start.way, $end.way, null, null, null append $waypoint to array $aWaypoints $fromCentre = $fromCentre + $ret.Range end endsub
sub.ManageDrone: if not $drone ->is being managed $unmanaged[$drone] = $drone $drone ->set is being managed: on=[TRUE] end endsub return null

sval.val: Map a sector with multiple ships
